DEFECT.cardsModifierDescription: Defect cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
DEFECT.description:
ilo ni li pali e ona sama lon tenpo ale
ona li utala kepeken ilo sike
DEFECT.eventDeathPrevention: I must live on for my friends!
DEFECT.goldMonologue: [sine]This gold can be exchanged for parts...[/sine]
DEFECT.title: ilo Tipeko
DEFECT.unlockText: Play a single run with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
DEPRIVED.title: Deprived
IRONCLAD.aromaPrinciple: [sine][red]Pain is nothing. My enemies must die.[/red][/sine]
IRONCLAD.cardsModifierDescription: Ironclad cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
IRONCLAD.description:
jan utala Iloka ni taso li moli ala
tenpo ale la ona li utala kepeken ilo utala kepeken seli
taso ona li wile ala utala
IRONCLAD.goldMonologue: [sine]These riches can bolster my tribe's armory...[/sine]
IRONCLAD.title: jan Iloka
NECROBINDER.aromaPrinciple: [sine][purple]They will be avenged... I will not falter...[/purple][/sine]
NECROBINDER.cardsModifierDescription: Necrobinder cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
NECROBINDER.description:
tomo palisa la jan ni pi wawa moli li open
tenpo utala la ona li kama e [gold]luka Asiti[/gold]
NECROBINDER.eventDeathPrevention: My friends won't make it without me.
NECROBINDER.goldMonologue: [sine]Maybe I can finally buy some shoes...[/sine]
NECROBINDER.title: jan Nekopinta
NECROBINDER.unlockText: Play a single run with [orange]{Prerequisite}[/orange] to unlock this character.
RANDOM_CHARACTER.description: Embark as a randomly chosen character.
RANDOM_CHARACTER.title: Random
RANDOM_CHARACTER.unlockText: Unlock all other characters to play as a random character.
REGENT.aromaPrinciple: [sine][orange]I am the next King of Stars...[/orange][/sine]
REGENT.cardsModifierDescription: Regent cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
REGENT.description:
tenpo kama la ona li kama e lawa mun
ona li jo e wawa mun
taso jan lili ona li pali e ale
REGENT.eventDeathPrevention: I must live on to help my team!!
REGENT.goldMonologue: [sine]I can commandeer an army of non-idiots...[/sine]
REGENT.title: jan Lijen
REGENT.unlockText: Play a single run with [green]{Prerequisite}[/green] to unlock this character.
SILENT.cardsModifierDescription: Silent cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
SILENT.description:
jan alasa ni li tan ala tomo palisa
ona li utala kepeken ilo utala lili kepeken jaki sijelo
SILENT.eventDeathPrevention: Must live on to hunt another day...
SILENT.goldMonologue: [sine]My sisters would be proud of these riches...[/sine]
SILENT.title: jan Silen
SILENT.unlockText: Play a single run to unlock this character.
